flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Clair County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at St Clair County Community College are 8% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($40.2k vs $37.3k).
